name: Beef with Tomato and Green Peppers
recipeIngredient: -(If hot house tomatoes are used, add 2 tablespoons water along with tomatoes at cooking time)
1 1/2 tablespoons Corn starch dissolved in 1/2 cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice beef into thin bite-sized pieces about 1x1". Ensure the slices are across the grain to prevent tough meat after cooking.
Marinate the meat in soya sauce, wine, and salt for a few minutes. Meanwhile, slice tomatoes, green peppers, and onion; mince garlic. Prepare the corn starch solution with sugar ready.
2. Heat oil in a wok until smoking. Stir-fry beef quickly for no longer than 3 minutes, then remove to a platter. Do not let beef continue cooking in the wok as it will become tough.
3. Add green peppers and tomatoes to the hot wok. Cook until tomato juice forms at the bottom of the wok (about 3-5 minutes).
4. Return beef to the wok. Stir all ingredients together so they are well mixed. Add the corn starch solution, cook for 1 minute. Turn off the burner and serve immediately.
